title: bridelia scandens
intro: Bridelia scandens, also known as the climbing bridelia or country borer, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in the treatment of various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Bridelia scandens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
